The '''loonee bird''' was a creature that lived on the forest moon of [[Endor/Legends|Endor]]. The [[Bird/Legends|bird]] laughed incessantly, and any other creature it touched would fall under its [[Perilous laughing spell|spell]] of uncontrollable laughter, a spell that could plague its victim forever and would temporarily affect any who go near them.

An Ewok legend told of a being at the top of [[Mount Sorrow]] whose tears had the power to reverse such spells. When young [[Teebo/Legends|Teebo]] came under the spell by plucking a tail feather from a loonee bird, his friends [[Wicket Wystri Warrick/Legends|Wicket]] and [[Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka/Legends|Kneesaa]] journeyed with him to the top of the [[Mountain/Legends|mountain]]. They discovered that the creature ''was'' the mountain and that his tears really could undo loonee bird's spell.

{{Creature-stub}}
